emails.subject: Frevert Piece
emails.body: Frevert Piece Hi Jeannie: My apologies. I've been switched over to Windows 2000 and, well, things have been somewhat bumpy. I have a few comments on the Frevert piece but can't find the document you sent. Could you resend it? Best, Jeff

emails.subject: Frevert Piece

emails.subject: Re: Frevert Piece
emails.body: Re: Frevert Piece Thanks for the warning about Windows 2000 they want to get me back to Houston to switch me, too, and I'm sure it's terrible for remote workers. Everything always is. Thanks for helping out with this piece I know we have to update to reflect SDG&E's new bilateral trade ability. Take care, Jeannie

emails.subject: Re: Frevert Piece
emails.body: Re: Frevert Piece I'd wait until, for example, Ginger and Maureen say they're happy and all the bugs have been worked out--my productivity has dropped by about 99%. I'll do some minor strike-out-underline and some minor suggestions and send back by 5 pm California time.
